text.title: AI Orphan-Link Detection Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed in real deployments of ai-orphan-link-detection. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Agent writes `[[setup-guide]]` but the slug never existed; doc renders broken on the site.
antipattern.fix: Load the union of L2 INDEX.xml slug attrs as ground truth before merge.

antipattern.symptom: Heading rename `## Configuration` → `## Configure` invalidates 12 inbound anchors; nothing fails.
antipattern.fix: Build anchor map per file in CI; reject PR if inbound anchor unresolved.

antipattern.symptom: External link checker flags Cloudflare-protected docs as 404; PRs blocked falsely.
antipattern.root-cause: No throttling + retry on HEAD failures.
antipattern.fix: Throttle to 1 req/host/sec; treat 429 as not-a-finding; retry 4xx with GET before failing.
